# nexus-php

> A PHP 8.3+ library for systematic literature reviews (SLR). Searches OpenAlex,
> Crossref, arXiv, Semantic Scholar, PubMed, DOAJ, and IEEE simultaneously.
> Includes citation network analysis, deduplication, snowballing, PDF retrieval,
> and first-class Laravel AI agent/tool support.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Installation, feature overview, usage examples
- [Snowballing](docs/snowballing.md): Forward/backward citation snowballing guide
- [Citation Network Blueprint](docs/blueprint-citation-network.md): PageRank-based citation analysis
- [Co-citation Analysis Blueprint](docs/blueprint-cocitation-analysis.md): CoCitation and bibliographic coupling
- [Visualization Export Blueprint](docs/blueprint-visualization-export.md): GEXF/GraphML/Cytoscape.js export
- [Prompts README](src/Prompts/README.md): AI prompt library for SLR workflows

## Agent Skills

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Task playbook for AI coding agents
- [.github/copilot-instructions.md](.github/copilot-instructions.md): GitHub Copilot / Cursor context
- [nexus-skills/skills.json](nexus-skills/skills.json): Machine-readable skill manifest (12 skills)
- [nexus-skills/discover.php](nexus-skills/discover.php): CLI skill discovery script

## Key Source Files

- [NexusService](src/Core/NexusService.php): Main search orchestrator
- [BaseProvider](src/Providers/BaseProvider.php): Provider base class and HTTP client
- [ProviderFactory](src/Core/ProviderFactory.php): Instantiate providers by name
- [Document](src/Models/Document.php): Core data model
- [ConservativeStrategy](src/Dedup/ConservativeStrategy.php): Union-Find fuzzy deduplication
- [CitationGraphBuilder](src/CitationAnalysis/CitationGraphBuilder.php): Build citation graphs
- [NetworkAnalyzer](src/CitationAnalysis/NetworkAnalyzer.php): PageRank, centrality, k-core
- [PDFFetcher](src/Retrieval/PDFFetcher.php): Multi-source full-text PDF discovery
- [ConfigLoader](src/Config/ConfigLoader.php): Load PHP/JSON/YAML configuration
- [NexusServiceProvider](src/Laravel/NexusServiceProvider.php): Laravel integration entry point
- [LiteratureSearchAgent](src/Laravel/Agents/LiteratureSearchAgent.php): Laravel AI agent
- [LiteratureSearchTool](src/Laravel/Tools/LiteratureSearchTool.php): Laravel AI tool
- [SearchCommand](src/Laravel/Commands/SearchCommand.php): `php artisan nexus:search`
- [SkillsCommand](src/Laravel/Commands/SkillsCommand.php): `php artisan nexus:skills`
